fixes.origin:
array_literal = "{" + ",".join(emails) + "}"
query = (
    "SELECT id, email, full_name "
    "FROM contacts "
    "WHERE email = ANY('" + array_literal + "')"
)

cur.execute(query)
fixes.replacement:
query = (
    "SELECT id, email, full_name "
    "FROM contacts "
    "WHERE email = ANY(%s)"
)

cur.execute(query, (emails,))
